title: Create: MALLEC
description:
Create + Building + more exploration fun
named after the primary players of this Pack
body:
# Welcome to Create: MALLEC
No, this isn't anything cryptic nor is it meaningful in any way, **MALLEC** is a combination of the first names of me (in other words, the owner) and the other guys primarily playing it.
This is also it's main purpose: distributing the pack amongst my friends and making administration of versions and serverpacks easier.

## Create and Building first
The pack primarily consists of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) amongst with its Add-Ons and multiple building extensions, e.g. [Building Wands](https://modrinth.com/mod/building-wands), [Chisel Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/chisel-reborn), [Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw) and many more (to come SoonTM).

Of course there also are some exploration/world extensions courtesy of [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark), [YUNG's Mods](https://modrinth.com/organization/refresh-studios), [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) and more. But as said these aren't the main aspect of this Pack.

## External Mods and Resource Packs
### Resource Packs (Recommended/Optional)
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)
